learner_profile.goal: Prepare for a DeepSeek product manager interview

source_items.text: DeepSeek PM interviews should test product judgment, AI system literacy, data metrics, cost awareness, and cross-functional collaboration. RAW_PRIVATE_INTERVIEW_NOTE_SHOULD_NOT_LEAK
source_items.title: DeepSeek PM interview brief

source_items.text: A product manager should understand how MoE architecture can affect inference cost and how R1-style reasoning models change product scenarios, latency expectations, and evaluation criteria.
source_items.title: DeepSeek technical product brief

answers.q_moe_cost: MoE can reduce active parameters per token, which may lower serving cost, but the PM still has to manage latency, routing quality, and product scenarios. PRIVATE_ANSWER_SHOULD_NOT_LEAK

results.feedback: Good answer: it connects MoE to cost and also names latency and routing as PM tradeoffs. Improve by adding one product metric such as cost per successful task.
results.improvement: Add one metric and one user scenario.

expected_points: MoE changes active compute and cost structure.
PMs must still evaluate latency, quality, and scenarios.
A strong answer names a product metric.
items.prompt: How can MoE architecture affect DeepSeek product cost and what PM tradeoff would you watch?
items.rubric: A strong answer links MoE to inference cost, latency, quality, and product metrics.

glossary.example: Ask whether a reasoning feature should use R1 only for complex tasks instead of every query.
glossary.explanation: Mixture-of-Experts activates part of the model for a token, so PMs should reason about cost, latency, and quality together.
glossary.technical_definition: A sparse architecture that routes computation to selected expert subnetworks.

glossary.example: Use stronger reasoning for code review or math-heavy workflows, but measure latency and task success.
glossary.explanation: R1-style reasoning models are useful when the product scenario benefits from explicit multi-step reasoning.
glossary.technical_definition: A reasoning-oriented model family optimized for multi-step problem solving.

overview.text: DeepSeek PM interview prep should cover product judgment, AI literacy, metrics, cost awareness, and collaboration.
Practice by answering one architecture-to-product tradeoff question, then force yourself to name a metric and a user scenario.
